field.name: eps_iqama_number
field.placeholder: Leave empty to use Saudi National / Iqama ID

field.name: eps_iban_number
field.placeholder: Leave empty to use Bank Account

field.name: eps_gross_salary
field.placeholder: Leave empty to calculate from contract

field.name: eps_basic_salary
field.placeholder: Leave empty to use contract wage

field.name: eps_housing_allowance
field.placeholder: Leave empty to use contract housing

field.name: eps_other_allowances
field.placeholder: Leave empty to use contract transportation + other

field.name: eps_standard_monthly_hours
field.placeholder: Leave empty to use report standard hours
